member.office_address: 2354 Rayburn House Office Building Washington DC 20515-1901

form_analysis.form_header_text: Congresswoman Pingree Appropriations Requests Fiscal Year 2027
form_analysis.form_instructions_text:
Rep. Pingree is accepting submissions for Fiscal Year 2027 programmatic and language requests. The deadline is Friday, March 13th at COB. If you have any questions about completing this form, contact Siri Pierce in Congresswoman Pingree's office at siri.pierce@mail.house.gov.

A separate submission is required for each request.

Please note that the form cannot be saved, it must be completed in one sitting.

sections.description: Select the type of request and the relevant appropriations bill.

fields.label: Is this a programmatic request, or a request for bill or report language?
fields.rationale: Reference values explicitly identify this as a programmatic funding request.

fields.label: Which bill does your request fall under?
options: Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies
Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
Energy and Water Development, and Related Agencies
Labor, Health and Human Services, Education, and Related Agencies
Military Construction, Veterans Affairs and Related Agencies
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs
Transportation, Housing and Urban Development, and Related Agencies
fields.draft_value: Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies
fields.rationale: NASA funding falls under the Commerce, Justice, Science, and Related Agencies subcommittee as specified in the reference values.

sections.description: Information about the project and the submitter.

fields.label: Program Title:
fields.rationale: Standard program name for this account as specified in the reference values.

fields.label: Brief description
fields.draft_value:
* $9 billion for NASA's Science Mission Directorate to support Earth Science, Planetary Science, Astrophysics, Heliophysics, and Biological and Physical Sciences
* Restores funding to levels required to meet National Academies' Decadal Survey priorities after FY 2026 budget disruptions
* Ensures U.S. leadership in space exploration and discovery against rising international competition
* Protects the specialized workforce and contractor base that supports over $23 million in NASA Science activity across Maine's 1st District
fields.rationale: Cites the specific $9 billion funding ask, references the need to restore funding from FY 2026 levels ($7.25 billion enacted), and links national strategic goals to local district spending totals.

fields.label: Are you making this request of any other offices? If so, please list the Member names below.
fields.draft_value:
* Senator Susan Collins
* Senator Angus King
fields.rationale: It is standard advocacy procedure for Maine constituents to submit identical NASA Science programmatic requests to their House representative and both state Senators.

fields.label: Will this request impact a particular community in Maine?
fields.draft_value:
* Supports over $23 million in active NASA Science funding for ME-01 institutions like the Gulf of Maine Research Institute in Portland
* Sustains high-tech manufacturing at Fiber Materials Inc. in Biddeford for heat-resistant shielding used in discovery missions
* Funds marine science and water quality monitoring at Bigelow Laboratory in East Boothbay and Colby College in Waterville
* Advances public ocean science engagement through Odysea LLC in Edgecomb
fields.rationale: Explicitly names major NASA Science award recipients and their locations within ME-01, using the provided spending context.

sections.description: Only complete if making a programmatic request.

fields.label: What was the FY24/FY25 Continuing Resolution enacted funding level:
fields.rationale: Using the FY2025 Enacted figure from the SMD Topline Funding History as the most recent enacted level.

fields.label:
What was the FY26 enacted funding level:
(in millions)
fields.rationale: The pre-filled and reference value for FY2026 enacted is $7.25 billion; formatted as '7,250' to match the 'in millions' instruction.

fields.label: If available, what is the FY27 funding level in the President's Budget Request?
fields.rationale: Per the reference data, the FY2027 President's Budget Request has not been released yet.

fields.label: What level of funding are you requesting for FY27?
fields.rationale: This is the specific funding ask amount provided in the reference values.

sections.description: Only complete if making a bill or report language request.

fields.label: Please enter the language you are requesting:
fields.rationale: The request context provided specifies that report and bill language are not applicable (N/A) for this programmatic funding request.

fields.label: Has this report language been included in any prior year?
fields.rationale: This is a user-specific question regarding prior-year activities that cannot be determined from the available strategic context.
